description_long: This is a modern, medium-sized wooden desk with a rich, dark brown finish and a distinctive raised shelf running along the back edge. The desk features a spacious main work surface, three drawers on the right side with metallic handles, and an open shelving unit on the left supported by metal legs. The design includes a recessed area for legroom and a pull-out keyboard tray beneath the main surface. The overall construction appears sturdy, with smooth, rounded edges and a combination of wood and metal elements for both aesthetics and support.
description: A dark brown wooden desk with a raised back shelf, three drawers, and open shelving supported by metal legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved profile of the main surface and raised shelf, with the desk's depth visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the open shelving on the left and the recessed leg space beneath the main surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the layered surfaces and the supporting metal legs of the shelving unit.
description_view_3: Front view showing the three drawers with metal handles, the pull-out keyboard tray, and the raised back shelf.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawers, keyboard tray, and open leg space is intended to face the user, while the raised shelf runs along the back edge.
